title: QDC Quantum Chest Stand
description: A Chest that can be accessed remotely via an item.
body:
This is a mod where you can access a specific chest remotely.


The chest needs to be on a Chest Stand block, and to access the chest you need a Chest Portal Item.


This mod works by teleporting the player on top of the chest while the chest GUI is open, then teleports the player back when the GUI closes.
